heading: Repealed. ,May 20, 1926, ch. 347, § 1444 Stat. 587
label: 101 to 125 Repealed. ,May 20, 1926, ch. 347, § 1444 Stat. 587
notes: Section 101, , , related to carriers and shipping affected by application of provisions of this chapter. See section 151 et seq. of this title.act July 15, 1913, ch. 6, § 138 Stat. 103
